caption: Sunday cooking with Linda. Bruschetta first, then the chicken parm. 🍝
Father's watch, every day. Some days it shows. 🕰️
Espresso pulled, paperwork stacked, Friday off. ☕
Heartland Saturday volunteer shift wrapped. Tray reset and signal out. 🦷
Pulse Fitness Wednesday — legs and core. Worth the 6 PM alarm. 💪
Cedar Table tasting pulled together by Emma. Antipasto plate carried it. 🍽️
Saffron Bakehouse cake topper detail. Linda's verdict is the one that counts. 🎂
Bloom & Petal centerpiece preview. White with a thread of color. 🌹
Northgate Sound first-dance setlist locked. Sinatra opens. 🎶
Linden Lane shot list draft. Linda + Grandma Rose portrait pinned. 📷
Patient-education zine v3 page two went back for one more pass. 📖
Riverstone Estate walkthrough with Emma + Diane + Linda. Path lighting confirmed. 🌳
Italian wine toast logistics. Linda's verdict holds. 🍷
Tigers home opener with Mike and Tyler. ⚾
Bachelor party Lake Erie cabin lock-in. Jake handles the route. 🚗
Rome dinner short-list trimmed to four. Honeymoon planning leans Naples-Sorrento-Rome. 🇮🇹
Mike's coolant flush window penciled in Saturday morning. ⚙️
Heartland WordPress deploy verified. Donation form passes smoke test. 🔧
Friday call with Grandma Rose locked at nine sharp. 📞
Antipasto course plan with Linda. Prosciutto, mozzarella, marinated artichokes. 🫒
Patient cleanings and perio assessments — eight to ten today at Lakewood.
Wedding October 17 — the antipasto course and the tarantella set locked in.
Sunday cooking with Linda, the deepest reset of the week.
Friday 9 AM call with Grandma Rose, the weekly visit after.
Dental therapy program grid in Notion; told Emma, not Linda yet.
Heartland Free Dental Clinic Saturday — cleanings for uninsured patients.
Pulse Fitness group class at 6; the music does half the work.
Espresso in the small white cups from Grandma Rose, windows cracked.
Emma has the DJ and bridesmaids; I've got almost everything else.
Wedding budget ledger in QuickBooks, Plaid read-only linked.
Chicken parm tonight, small variations I keep secret.
Frank Sinatra Saturday morning at the right volume, even in winter.
Tigers game with Mike and Tyler when they're free.
Nagged Tyler about studying again — protective older brother.
Chris and Jake sharing best-man duties; Chris the organized one.
CE credits tracked, license renewal due in April.
Up at 4:15 with the spreadsheets; working on being kinder to myself.
Cedar Table Catering is the wedding frontrunner, tasting soon.
Drove Linda to the appointment she could've driven herself to.
Antipasto and caprese for the family — feeding whoever stops by.
Aisle Planner timeline updated, the binder tabs all named.
Diane and Linda get along, a daily relief for me.
Italy honeymoon simmering — restaurant over monument.
Father's watch on every day since the first job.
